lines.hearsay: Someone at {place} was being praised, at length, and the room got cooler for it.
lines.gossip: {A} held up {B}'s weld at {place} and called it the best work in the shop, with {C} standing right there holding the accounts — {C} said nothing at all, which in {C} is the loudest thing available, and {B} stopped watching the door for a day and a half, which is the longest {A} has managed all season.
lines.report: {A} commended {B}'s work at {place} in the presence of {C}, slot {slot}.
